Dialog.name: MND_AfterSchool_General
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Class has ended for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_AfterSchool_Test_End
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've finished today's exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_AfterSchool_No_0408
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_1ST_TERM_END_0725
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today marks the end of the first term.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer break begins tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_2ST_TERM_END_1226
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today marks the end of the second term.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Winter break begins tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_FULLMOON_0509
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There will be a full moon tonight. It is[n]the day I was forewarned about...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if something will happen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably head back[n]to the dorm, just in case.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_FULLMOON_0707
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There will be a full moon tonight.[n]A powerful Shadow may appear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should return to the[n]dorm and prepare myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_FULLMOON_0905
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There will be a full moon tonight.[n]A powerful Shadow will appear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should return to the[n]dorm and prepare myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_INFO_0427
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru has left the classroom...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems I can join the student council if I[n]submit some paperwork at the faculty office.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to the faculty office[n]when I have some free time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_INFO_0513
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The library is open for students to study in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It might be worth taking advantage[n]of it ahead of next week's exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_INFO_0514
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, the teacher in the nurse's[n]office gives out strange medicine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should check it out sometime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Call_GoToHOME_0420
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems that something important[n]will be happening at the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head back early.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Call_Sanada_0902
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That's right, I received a message from[n]Sanada earlier asking to meet after school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go meet up with him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Strega_0814
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go to Tatsumi Memorial[n]Hospital for my checkup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Storm_Coming_0918
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The clouds look ominous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SportsClub_Join_0423
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, the track team is[n]recruiting new members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I can find where they practice, maybe[n]I could see about possibly joining the team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_UsedBookstoreOPEN_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, the bookstore at[n]the strip mall is reopening today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MAIKOisShrine_0506
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, there is a lonely[n]little girl at the shrine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should check up on[n]her to see if she's okay...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_CultureClub_Join_061
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, the art club[n]is recruiting new members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I might be able to learn more about[n]them if I visit their club room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_RYOJI_LINK3_1201
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh yeah, I got a message from Ryoji.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looked like he wasn't at school today.[n]Maybe something urgent came up...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ToVelvetRoom_0430
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth mentioned she[n]had something important to discuss with me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ToVelvetRoom_0618
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth mentioned she[n]had something important to discuss with me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_0708_only
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know that person who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kinda spooky, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_0708_some
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know those people who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Multiple missing people found with Apathy Syndrome... Think it's just a coincidence?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_0807
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And now to more disturbing news. A missing resident was found, but with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The victim displayed no signs of external trauma, and police have ruled out the possibility that this was the cause of a criminal incident.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_0907_only
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know that person who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kinda unnerving, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_0907_some
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know those people who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kinda creepy, don'tcha think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1006_BNKC_on
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was wondering why I haven't seen that old man at the bookstore lately. So, he went missing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Turns out he got Apathy Syndrome. I guess he is getting up there in years...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1006_BNKC_so
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was wondering why I haven't seen that old man at the bookstore lately. So, he went missing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, they still haven't found him... Isn't that scary?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1006_some
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know those people who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kinda spooky, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1006_only
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know that person who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kinda spooky, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1106_MAIKO_o
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, did you see the news? That grade-schooler is still missing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hadn't heard that yet. That's kinda scary...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1106_MAIKO_s
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, I heard those missing people still haven't been found.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, one of them was a grade-schooler. What is the world coming to...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1106_some
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know those people who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kinda unnerving, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1106_only
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know that person who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kinda unnerving, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1204_only
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know that person who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There've been a lot of Apathy Syndrome cases lately, haven't there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1204_some
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you know those people who went missing? I heard they were found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apathy Syndrome cases have been going through the roof lately, haven't they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_1231
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Now to another missing person report. A missing woman was found with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The victim displayed no signs of external trauma, and police have ruled out the possibility that this was the cause of a criminal incident.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Missing_0131
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now an update on the recent disappearances. We can confirm that at least one of those located were found to have Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Our reporter on the scene says police are investigating a lead on a recent cult gathering...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0504
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Greenery Day, the[n]second day of Golden Week.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0505
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Children's Day, the[n]last day of Golden Week.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HolidayNoon_0510
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}. Were you able to get some rest after last night?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I apologize for the trouble, but I'm counting on you. And don't worry, Akihiko will be rejoining the front lines soon enough as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That aside, don't forget that exams are coming up, so why don't you take today to relax a little?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0719
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The post-exam break begins today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0803
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer vacation continues...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0820
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer vacation is starting to wind down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0824
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The film festival only[n]runs for one more week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite someone[n]from the dorm to go with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0825_083
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summer vacation will be over soon...[n]The film festival is almost over, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite someone[n]from the dorm to go with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0831
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the last day of summer vacation,[n]and the film festival ends today as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite someone[n]from the dorm to go with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0922
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is a national holiday. There's no school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0923
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the autumnal equinox.[n]There's no school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a one-day film festival today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite someone[n]from the dorm to go with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_1012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Health and Sports[n]Day. There's no school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_1123
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Labor Thanksgiving[n]Day. There's no school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_1223
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the Emperor's birthday.[n]There's no school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Winter vacation is almost over...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0107
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is the last day of winter vacation...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_0111
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is Coming of Age[n]Day. There's no school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_testweek
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Exams are coming up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HolidayNoon_General
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no school today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Mail_Order_Today
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost time for the home shopping show.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Mail_Order_0807_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today, we're sprucing things up with a summer-only Amazing Commodities Monday special![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Mail_Order_0807_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a colorful voice[n]coming from the TV...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_0102_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The news is on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0102_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It was reportedly a gathering organized by a new religious group. Police are working to confirm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_XB_6630_RYOJI_LE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji is acting weird... I should[n]head to the {f 0 1 2}music room{f 0 1 27} later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}（※仮テキスト）[n]{f 1 5 0}失踪者解禁イベントが本来発生します。[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}現在イベントがまだないので今回は仮処理で[n]{f 1 5 0}ポロニアンモールに移動します。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
